description: Execution date in the preamble ("is made as of [________], 20[__]"). One selector consumes the WHOLE split slot — both blanks plus the literal ", 20" between them — so a single date value (ISO input is rendered as e.g. "March 15, 2026" by the type: date formatting in prepareFillData) replaces the former month-day + two-digit-year field pair. Anchored on "is made as of" because the blanks are not globally unique.

fixtures.note: preamble date slot; regex captures the combined [________], 20[__] span so the fill renders one formatted date
